title: Define v5.0 governed runtime priorities after the Human Recognition Interface release
description: Set the next post-v4.0 frontier by determining which governed runtime improvement most directly strengthens allocation, escalation, and organization judgment without weakening the Human Recognition Interface contract. The next step must preserve artifact-backed human recognition while making workforce semantics more operationally decisive.
triage_notes: Opened during v4.0.0 release finalization so the runtime remains truthful after the Human Recognition Interface ships. Use this frontier to decide the smallest credible v5.0 follow-on release after the operator surface upgrade.
